titleStmt.title: SII 39.213: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 213. (A.R. No. 213 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME MAṆḌAPA. VĪRAPRATĀPA SADĀŚIVARĀYA MAHĀRĀYA, ŚAKA 1466 (1544 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of the village Oṭṭipākkam, besides house to a certain Veṅgappapiḷḷai, the son of Muḍumbai Arasuppiḷḷai belonging to the Kāshyapagōtra of Īñjambāḍu by the temple officials Kēḷvikkēsuvachchayarum, Srī Bhaṇdārattār for the supply of sacred food to the temple Tirupputkuḷi Pērāṟṟunāyīṉār of Tiruppati of Dāmalkōṭṭam in Dāmal-Nāḍu of Jayaṅgoṇḍa chōlamaṇḍalam. Kōyirkaṇakku Tiruppuṭkuḻi Priyaṉ Kāttamuttāṉ Vijayar is mentioned as signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī manmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran metiṉi mīcurakaṇṭa kaṭṭāri sāḷuvana Ariyarāya vipāṭan pāṣaikkut tappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ muvarāyar kaṇṭan rācātirāca rācaparamecuran śrī virappiṟatāpa
catāciva teva makārāyar piṟitivirācciyam paṇṇiyaruḷā niṉṟa cakāṟtam 1000 4 100 6 10 6 ṉ mel cellā niṉṟa copakiṟa samvatsarattu ciṅkaṉāyaṟṟu pūṟuva paṣṣattu caṣṭṭiyum comavāramum peṟṟa coti naṣ
ṣattiṟattu ṉāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattut tāmalṉāṭu tāmalkkoṭṭattut tiruppati tiruppuṭkkuḻi poreṟṟu nayiṉār koyil keḻvik kecuvacciyarum śrī paṇṭārattārum
yīñcampāṭi Āpastampa cūttiṟattu kācipa kottiṟattu muṭumpai Aracupiḷḷai puttiṟaṉ veṅkappāpiḷḷaikku poliyūṭṭu sāsanam kuṭuttapaṭi tammuṭaiya poliyūṭṭāṉa tiṉac
ciṟappu ṉāḷ Oṉṟukkut taḷikai Āṟukkut tāmal lappaṉāyakkar catācivarāyar vicanakaram koṇṭa ceytikku rāyasam vanta santoḻa veḷaiyile tārāpūṟuvamāka paṇṇik koṇṭu viṭṭa
Oṭṭipākkam śrī paṇṭārattile Āṇṭu koṇṭu yintak kiṟāmattil Uṟpaṉṉam koṇṭu ṉāḷ Oṉṟukku Āṟu taḷikai tiruppa ṉām Amutu ceyappaṇṇivikkak kaṭaiomākavum yitil
viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu tamakku ṉālil Oṉṟukku Oṉṟarait taḷikaiyum caṉṉatit teruvil Oṉṟarait taḷikaiyum caṉṉatit teruvil teṉciṟakil Aṇṇayaṅkār kuṭiyirukkiṟa maṉaikkuk kiḻakku kiḻaivitikku meṟkuppaḷḷi koṇṭa perumāḷ
kuṭiyirunta kaṇakkuppiḷḷai Eḻuvakkariyar kāṇiyāṭciyāṉa maṉai Oṉṟukku Aṭamuppattāṟum vālvīccaṭi ṉūṟum yinta maṉaiyum kuṭuttu cantāṉa paramparai cantiṟātittavaraiyum naṭatta yintat
taṟmamum cantiṟātittavaraiyum naṭattak kaṭaivomākavum yinta maṉai yivaṟku tāṉāti taṉmaṅkaḷ viṉivikkiṟaiyam cela niti nikṣepam Akṣaṇi Ākāmi citta sāttiya meṉkiṉṟa Aṣṭapoka te
casvāmiyaṅkaḷukkum Urittākak kaṭavatākavum yippaṭi cammatittu maṉaiyum poliyūṭṭum taṟmasāsaṉam paṇṇik kuṭuttom veṅkappāpiḷḷaikku poreṟṟu nayiṉār śrī paṇṭāra
ttārom § kecavacciyar Eḻuttu yivai koyiṟ kaṇakkut tiruppuṭkuḻip piriyan kāttamuttiṉ vijaiyar Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.213 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
